title: Guitars
description: CIT resource pack that adds cool electric guitars to Minecraft!
body:
![renames list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0a66f6a5c8bdb3ce27ee59464027ae344d58403.png) ![first person view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/u6vG1AZi/images/420c0d9f6ed11ec96bb7f1579aac4b3272c8a371.png)
How to use

**Author of the original model - [https://x.com/Wan_w1n](https://x.com/Wan_w1n)** **To obtain it, rename any sword/axe on the anvil. Works with Optifine or modification "[Cit Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)" (Fabric)** **Here is the naming guide:** [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1gkkQ1W__MAyGtcnCvOL838d10cEE5HtsY1J1VAIA7fM/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1gkkQ1W__MAyGtcnCvOL838d10cEE5HtsY1J1VAIA7fM/edit?usp=sharing).
